name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Mini #Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
·Cp Exclusive®️Classic Cognac
Classic MCM minimalism is presented through a modern minimalist design. This mini shopping bag features a scaled-down version of the iconic Liz silhouette while retaining its beloved functionality. The inclusion of an independent pouch and double-sided cotton canvas fabric makes this compact carryall even more charming.
Model: MWPDSLRO1CO001
Size: 28*11.5*20cm
Handle Drop: 18cm
Features: Double-sided/Bag-in-Bag
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
